revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Microformat message | format = hCalendar | data = event details
| subtemplates = {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |<noinclude>}} Dates will only be included if you use {{tl|start date}} (for single dates) or {{tl|end date}}. Do not, however, use these templates [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
To include URLs, use {{tl|URL}}. {{#if:{{{hide_subtemplates}}} |</noinclude>}} |attendee |contact |description |dtend |dtstart |location |organiser |summary |url |vevent | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc | |{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | |}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]
[[Category:Templates generating hCalendars|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
